/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-gcc.exe  -mtune=generic -Wall -Wvla -ffast-math -ftree-vectorize -D_GNU_SOURCE  -fmax-errors=1 -DUSE_CM108 -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--enable-auto-import CMakeFiles/kissutil.dir/kissutil.c.o CMakeFiles/kissutil.dir/kiss_frame.c.o CMakeFiles/kissutil.dir/ax25_pad.c.o CMakeFiles/kissutil.dir/fcs_calc.c.o CMakeFiles/kissutil.dir/textcolor.c.o CMakeFiles/kissutil.dir/serial_port.c.o CMakeFiles/kissutil.dir/dtime_now.c.o CMakeFiles/kissutil.dir/dwsock.c.o -o kissutil.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libkissutil.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0  -lm ../external/misc/libmisc.a -lws2_32 -lm
